description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define two variables: CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE set to isciences/wsim_geoserver:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE set to isciences/wsim_geoserver:latest. Include a before_script that logs into Docker Hub with username ci4isciences and the $DOCKERHUB_PW secret. In the build stage add a build job that runs `docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .` then `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`. In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch, executing `docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`, `docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE`, and `docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE`.
